content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:1-14, SecureField for password) but review_information contains only placeholder credentials/notes: demo_user.txt="test", demo_password.txt="changeme", notes.txt="TBD".
Pierre: Apple's App Review team will actually try to sign in with these credentials and read the notes to understand how to reach your core features; placeholder values like "test"/"changeme"/"TBD" will almost certainly cause a rejection or at least a delay. Please provide a real working demo account (with the backend enabled) and write actual reviewer notes describing any non-obvious steps to reach gated content.
